seoTitle: Burnside vs Burran Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burnside and Burran Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burnside vs Burran Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burnside and Burran Rock.
heading: Burnside vs Burran Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burnside, Western Australia and Burran Rock, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burran Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Burnside (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burnside or Burran Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burnside has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Burran Rock scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burnside scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Burran Rock scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burnside or Burran Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burran Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
